items.title: When I build skills now I always ask AI to spin up a separate eval agent to do yes/no che…
items.title_zh: 当我现在培养技能时，我总是要求人工智能启动一个单独的评估代理来执行是/否检查……
items.description: When I build skills now I always ask AI to spin up a separate eval agent to do yes/no checks to grade the first agent's output. And if the output isn't "yes" across the board it asks the first agent to keep working. Building one for YouTub…
items.description_zh: 当我现在培养技能时，我总是要求人工智能启动一个单独的评估代理来进行是/否检查，以对第一个代理的输出进行评分。如果输出不是全面的“是”，它会要求第一个代理继续工作。为 YouTube 构建一个...

items.title: We've set the default effort level for Opus 4.7 to xhigh in Claude Code.
items.title_zh: 我们在 Claude 代码中将 Opus 4.7 的默认工作级别设置为 xhigh。
items.description: We've set the default effort level for Opus 4.7 to xhigh in Claude Code. You can use /effort to adjust this. Excited for you to try Claude Code with Opus 4.7 and let us know your feedback!
items.description_zh: 我们在 Claude 代码中将 Opus 4.7 的默认工作级别设置为 xhigh。您可以使用 /effort 来调整它。很高兴您尝试 Claude Code 和 Opus 4.7，并让我们知道您的反馈！

items.description: 3. Tell the model how to verify its changes. Put your testing workflow in your claude.md, or add a /verify-app skill. Opus 4.7 is better at verifying it's work, and it's helpful to share any local dev tips that are hard to discover.
items.description_zh: 3. 告诉模型如何验证其更改。将您的测试工作流程放入 claude.md 中，或添加 /verify-app 技能。 Opus 4.7 更擅长验证其工作，并且分享任何难以发现的本地开发技巧很有帮助。
